profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.subtitle: The working-mode entry point. A profile switches model, provider, network, MCP, and safety policy together.
profiles.createHint: A diff is generated first. The config is backed up and written only after confirmation.
profiles.mcpSubsection: MCP tools referenced by this profile

providers.title: Providers
providers.subtitle: Manage model providers written into ~/.codex/config.toml. Subscription, official API, compatible API, and local gateway stay separated to avoid auth conflicts.
providers.createHint: A diff is generated first. The config is backed up and written only after confirmation. Enter an environment variable name, never a raw API key.
providers.networkSubsection: Network route attached to this provider

models.title: Models
models.subtitle: BYOK catalog: aggregates all entries from ~/.opencodex/custom_model_catalog.json and decides which models show up in the Codex App picker.
models.byokHintBody: Switching is a whole CodexProfile, not a bare model field. Codex Box writes ~/.codex/config.toml through the existing backup → diff → confirm → atomic write loop, and writes ~/.opencodex/custom_model_catalog.json through the same loop. Unknown fields are preserved to stay compatible with the AITabby/opencodex CLI.

providerRoutes.title: Provider Routes
providerRoutes.subtitle: Manage ~/.opencodex/providers.json. Each route feeds a group of model candidates into the Codex App picker.

codexRuntime.title: Codex Runtime
codexRuntime.subtitle: Read-only detection of Codex Desktop, Codex CLI, and ~/.opencodex/. Codex Box does not modify Codex Desktop internals and does not start any external gateway process.
codexRuntime.readonlyHintBody: This page only shows install paths, file locations, and last-read times. Codex Box does not patch Codex Desktop internals and does not open any HTTP/WS port. After Codex App re-reads ~/.codex/config.toml, the new models appear in the picker automatically.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.subtitle: Grouped checks for config, provider, BYOK dir, network, MCP, and backup with a redacted report.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: App-level settings for language, theme, safety policy, backup retention, log redaction, and BYOK behavior.

draft.title: Draft
draft.desc: All edits enter a draft first

backup.title: Backup
backup.desc: Save the original config before write

sectionDesc.byok: BYOK write master switch, schema preservation, and visibility sync

language.label: Language
language.desc: Follow the current interface language and switch anytime.

theme.label: Theme
theme.desc: Keep the light Mac Dashboard direction. Dark mode will be added later.

startupCheck.label: Startup check
startupCheck.desc: Read config and refresh the Dashboard summary on launch.

requireDiff.label: Require diff before write
requireDiff.desc: Every save action must go through Config Diff first.

maskSecrets.label: Mask secrets
maskSecrets.desc: API keys, tokens, and passwords never appear in UI or logs.

confirmDanger.label: Confirm dangerous actions
confirmDanger.desc: Delete, rollback, and overwrite actions require confirmation.

backupFirst.label: Backup before write
backupFirst.desc: Create a backup record before changing config.

retention.label: Backup retention
retention.desc: Keep up to 50 backups by default; settings will be editable later.

rollback.label: Protected rollback
rollback.desc: Rollback also backs up the current state first.

redaction.label: Log redaction
redaction.desc: Diagnostics keep route, status, and latency summaries only.

maxSize.label: Log size limit
maxSize.desc: Rotate logs when they reach the configured limit.

exportReport.label: Export diagnostic report
exportReport.desc: Reports are redacted by default and safe to copy.

byokWriteEnabled.label: BYOK write master switch
byokWriteEnabled.desc: When off, Models and Provider Routes pages are read-only and no writes hit ~/.opencodex/.

byokSchemaPreserve.label: BYOK schema preservation
byokSchemaPreserve.desc: Preserve unknown fields when reading/writing ~/.opencodex/*.json, so AITabby CLI stays compatible.

byokVisibilitySync.label: Visibility sync
byokVisibilitySync.desc: When toggling visibility on the Models page, sync the change into custom_model_catalog.json.

feedback.profileFormInvalid: Profile name, model, and provider are required.
feedback.profileExists: A Profile with this name already exists.
feedback.dangerBlocked: Dangerous action blocked. Real deletion must go through diff and backup.
feedback.providerFormInvalid: Fill in name, base_url, environment variable, and at least one model.
feedback.providerSecretRejected: Do not paste a raw secret here. Use an environment variable name such as OPENROUTER_API_KEY.
feedback.opencodexParseErrors: BYOK directory files failed to parse; writes are blocked:
feedback.openLogs: Log entry is ready; real log reading will be wired later.
feedback.mcpToggled: {{name}} enabled state updated in frontend state.
feedback.writeBlocked: Safe save blocked: real writes require backup + diff + atomic write.
feedback.rollbackConfirm: Rollback entered confirmation state and will not overwrite config directly.

dashboard.statusOk: Codex config looks healthy · Last backup 2 minutes ago · {{time}}
